violations.thesis: Конвенция как решение координационной проблемы через общее знание
violations.mustBe: A single shared contract serving as common knowledge
violations.attractive: API consistency across frontend and backend

violations.reason: PR #17 and #18 review verdicts confirm that client-side fallback authentication stores plain user credentials in 'localStorage' under the 'registered_users' key, exposing passwords in cleartext.
PR #18 review verdict indicates that JWT expiration is hardcoded (86400000L) directly in the AuthController, violating the rule against magic numbers.
PR #19 coverage audit indicates missing REST API for CRUD on bookmarks, missing backend registration/login endpoints, missing user isolation, and missing URL validation.
PR #19 coverage audit indicates missing Web UI for bookmark management and missing UI forms for user registration and login.
